raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The query image shows a medium-sized dog with long, white/cream-colored fur. Comparing this to the provided examples:
- Class 20 shows cats (long-haired, pointed ears).
- Class 29 shows large, white, fluffy dogs (Samoyed type).
- Class 28 shows large, brown and white dogs (St. Bernard type).
- Class 13 shows medium-sized dogs with white and black/spotted coats and floppy ears (Setter type).

While the query image is white like class 29, it is significantly smaller in scale relative to the environment and has a different body structure than the large Samoyed-type dogs. However, looking at the available labels, the most similar visual feature is the long, light-colored fur. Given the options, the query image most closely resembles the white, long-haired dogs in class 29, although it appears to be a different breed. Re-evaluating the options, none of the dog classes (29, 28, 13) perfectly match a small white dog, but class 29 is the only one featuring white-coated dogs.
</explanation>

<response>29</response>
